relevant_files.rationale: Single tsconfig for the entire desktop app — controls all compilation settings, path aliases, includes/excludes, and strictness. This is the master config for S4 typecheck verification.

key_code.description: strict: true — enables all strict type-checking options. Critical for S4: any type errors will fail the typecheck.
47 path alias mappings. 25+ @superset/* aliases redirect to local stub files. Key for S4: all @superset/* imports must resolve through these paths.
moduleResolution: 'bundler' — allows extensionless imports and path aliases. electron-vite and vite-tsconfig-paths handle resolution at build time.
noEmit: true — tsc only typechecks, electron-vite handles actual bundling. S4 scope: tsc --noEmit must pass.
types: ['bun'] — uses Bun type definitions globally. Test files use bun:test.
Includes src/**/*.ts, src/**/*.tsx, src/**/*.d.ts, index.d.ts, electron.vite.config.ts, electron-builder.ts, electron-builder.canary.ts, runtime-dependencies.ts
Excludes node_modules, dist, dist-electron, release, agent-setup/templates, index.full.ts, pty-subprocess.ts, -layout.tsx, DashboardSidebar.tsx

relevant_files.topic_relation: Master compilation configuration. S4 verification must ensure all included files typecheck with strict:true and all @superset/* path aliases resolve to existing local files.

relevant_files.rationale: Defines all scripts (typecheck, build, dev, test), all dependencies (27 runtime + 19 dev), and the Electron entry point. Central to S4 dependency verification.

key_code.description: tsc --noEmit — the S4 verification target. Must exit 0 for milestone completion.
electron-vite build — the S4 build target. Must produce valid dist/ output.
electron-vite dev --watch — development server. Must start without errors.
bun test — test runner. S4 should verify tests pass or document known failures.
91 runtime dependencies including React 19, Electron IPC (trpc-electron), AI SDK, CodeMirror, DnD kit, terminal (xterm, node-pty), database (better-sqlite3, drizzle-orm)
19 dev dependencies: TypeScript 6.0.3, Electron 40.8.5, electron-vite 4.0.1, Vite 7.3.5, TailwindCSS 4.2.2, Biome (not listed — likely global)
./dist/main/index.js — Electron entry point. Must exist after build.
module — ESM mode. All imports use ESM syntax.

relevant_files.topic_relation: S4 compile verification entry point. typecheck, build, and test scripts must all pass. Dependency versions must be compatible.

relevant_files.rationale: Defines the three build targets (main, preload, renderer) with separate plugin chains, env var injection, and Rollup options. S4 build verification depends on this config.

key_code.description: Entry: src/main/index.ts, output: dist/main. Uses tsconfigPaths plugin. Externalizes electron + native modules (better-sqlite3, node-pty, etc.).
Entry: src/preload/index.ts, output: dist/preload. Uses tsconfigPaths + externalizeDepsPlugin (excludes trpc-electron).
Entry: src/renderer/index.html, output: dist/renderer. Uses tanstackRouter, tsconfigPaths, tailwindcss, reactPlugin. Dev server on port 5173.
Filters @oh-my-maestro/* packages from empty object — currently no workspace deps. Placeholder for future monorepo expansion.
Imported from runtime-dependencies.ts. Lists native modules that must be externalized (not bundled).

relevant_files.topic_relation: S4 build chain: electron-vite build must produce dist/main, dist/preload, dist/renderer with correct module externalization.

relevant_files.rationale: Defines native Node.js modules that must be externalized during bundling (better-sqlite3, node-pty, native-keymap, @ast-grep/napi, @parcel/watcher, libsql). Critical for build correctness.

key_code.description: 6 native modules with asarUnpackGlobs and materialize configs: better-sqlite3, node-pty, native-keymap, @ast-grep/napi, @parcel/watcher, libsql
7 support modules copied as-is: bindings, file-uri-to-path, detect-libc, is-glob, is-extglob, picomatch, node-addon-api
Exported array consumed by electron.vite.config.ts main.build.rollupOptions.external

relevant_files.topic_relation: S4 build verification: all native modules must be correctly externalized. Missing or incorrect externalization causes runtime crashes.

call_chains.name: TypeScript Compilation Chain
chain: -> includes: src/**/*.ts, src/**/*.tsx, src/**/*.d.ts, index.d.ts, electron.vite.config.ts, electron-builder.ts, electron-builder.canary.ts, runtime-dependencies.ts
-> excludes: node_modules, dist, dist-electron, release, agent-setup/templates, index.full.ts, pty-subprocess.ts, -layout.tsx, DashboardSidebar.tsx
-> paths: 47 aliases mapping @superset/*, @/*, @main/*, @renderer/*, @preload/*, @shared/*, main/*, shared/*, lib/*, renderer/*
call_chains.description: Single tsconfig for entire desktop app. No project references. tsc --noEmit typechecks all included files. 4 files excluded that must be reintegrated for S4.

call_chains.name: Electron-Vite Build Chain
chain: -> main: src/main/index.ts -> dist/main/index.js (tsconfigPaths plugin, externalizes native modules)
-> renderer: src/renderer/index.html -> dist/renderer/ (tanstackRouter + tsconfigPaths + tailwindcss + reactPlugin)
call_chains.description: Three-target build: main process (Node.js), preload (limited Node.js), renderer (browser). Each has separate plugin chains and Rollup options. Native modules externalized via runtime-dependencies.ts.

call_chains.name: @superset/* Import Resolution Chain
chain: -> electron-vite: vite-tsconfig-paths plugin resolves same aliases at build time
-> 25+ @superset/* aliases mapped to local files in src/main/lib/, src/shared/, src/renderer/components/Chat/stubs/
call_chains.description: All @superset/* imports are resolved through tsconfig paths to local stub/adapted files. No actual @superset packages are installed. This is the S3 migration pattern.

call_chains.name: tRPC Router Aggregation Chain
chain: src/lib/trpc/index.ts (initTRPC, router, publicProcedure, trpc React client)

-> Individual routers: auth, analytics, auto-update, browser, browser-history, cache, changes, chat-runtime-service, chat-service, command-chain, config, device, external, filesystem, host-service-coordinator, keyboardLayout, maestro, menu, migration, notifications, permissions, ports, projects, resource-metrics, ringtone, settings, system, terminal, ui-state, window, workspaces
call_chains.description: 30 tRPC sub-routers aggregated into single AppRouter. Each router may import from main/lib/*, shared/*, or main/* path aliases. Any type error in any router propagates.

call_chains.name: Main Process Initialization Chain (index.full.ts — excluded)
call_chains.description: Full initialization sequence in index.full.ts (463 lines). Currently excluded from typecheck. Reintegration is the primary S4 task.

data_flows.name: IPC Communication Flow
flow: Renderer (React) -> tRPC client (@trpc/client + trpc-electron) -> Electron IPC -> Main process tRPC server -> Business logic -> Response
Fallback: Renderer -> window.ipcRenderer.invoke/send -> Main process ipcMain.handle/on
Terminal: Renderer -> tRPC terminal router -> Terminal Host Client (Unix socket) -> Terminal Host Daemon -> PTY subprocess
data_flows.description: Primary IPC via tRPC over Electron IPC transport (trpc-electron). Fallback to raw ipcRenderer for low-level needs. Terminal uses separate Unix socket protocol.

data_flows.name: Build Output Flow
flow: -> dist/main/index.js (main process bundle, native modules externalized)
data_flows.description: Build produces three output directories. electron-builder packages them into platform-specific installers.

data_flows.name: Environment Variable Flow
flow: -> electron-vite define: injects into main, preload, renderer bundles at build time
data_flows.description: Environment variables flow from .env through build-time injection to runtime validation. Main and shared layers use t3-env for validation.

data_flows.name: Database Access Flow
flow: Renderer: tRPC client -> tRPC routers -> local-db (never direct DB access)
data_flows.description: All database access goes through main process. Renderer accesses data via tRPC. better-sqlite3 is a native module externalized during build.

summary:
S4 compile verification exploration complete. The oh-my-maestro desktop app is a single-package Electron + TypeScript + Bun project with no monorepo workspace dependencies. Key findings:

1. TSCONFIG: Single tsconfig.json with strict:true, moduleResolution:'bundler', noEmit:true. 47 path aliases map 25+ @superset/* imports to local stub files. 4 files are currently EXCLUDED from typecheck: index.full.ts (463-line main entry), pty-subprocess.ts, -layout.tsx, and DashboardSidebar.tsx.

2. BUILD CHAIN: electron-vite with 3 targets (main/preload/renderer). Native modules (better-sqlite3, node-pty, etc.) externalized via runtime-dependencies.ts. Build output goes to dist/.

3. CRITICAL S4 BLOCKERS (4 excluded files):
   - index.full.ts: The real main process entry with 30+ imports. Must be un-excluded.
   - pty-subprocess.ts: PTY subprocess with @superset/pty-daemon imports.
   - -layout.tsx: Root layout with @superset/ui/atoms/Alert import.
   - DashboardSidebar.tsx: Large component with @superset/ui and @dnd-kit imports.

4. DEPENDENCY STATUS: 91 runtime + 19 dev dependencies installed via Bun. TypeScript 6.0.3, zod 4.3.6 (v4 — breaking changes from v3), Electron 40.8.5. No Biome config found at project level (may be global or in IDE).
